title: Stuff
description: This Mod adds some random stuff. Have a play around and see what you can find! There is loads to play with! I can also add things you want on my scratch account in the description.
body:
# What is the Stuff mod?
The Stuff mod is a mod that has loads of stuff like Rubies, Food (Update 5 was the extra food update), and even stuff that you have requested! If you are interested in random little things and additions to the game, the Stuff mod is the mod for you.
# How do I request a feature?
You can go to this page to request features on GitHub: [GitHub Request Features For Stuff](https://github.com/TechspertGit/RequestForStuff/issues)
# Was this all made by me?
Yes, I have recieved zero help in making this mod, and if you want to make mods like this, there are many things that can help you develop a mod! If you see the contributers to this project, Morph_Mojang and SpringDragonX, they have no access to change anything, they are friends and family.
